system_requirements.world_mission: Uncover the source of the Great Decay and restore life to a world consumed by death
system_requirements.theme_and_tone: Grim, desolate, and haunting, with themes of existential despair and fragile hope
system_requirements.core_conflict: A struggle between survivors clinging to the last fertile enclaves and the spreading Necrotic Blight that reanimates the dead as husks

dynamic_lore.necromantic_energy_system: A corrupted magic system where practitioners channel the residual life-force of the dead, but overuse causes their bodies to crystallize into 'soul-sculptures'
dynamic_lore.dead_zones: Areas where all organic matter has been reduced to blackened ash, patrolled by sentient shadows called Wraithspires that feed on memories
dynamic_lore.factions: 1. The Verdant Circle (botanists preserving life), 2. Hollow Covenant (necromancers seeking godhood), 3. Ashborn Nomads (scavengers immune to the Blight)
dynamic_lore.key_artifact: The Heart of Erebos - a pulsating obsidian orb said to contain the consciousness of the world itself, hidden in the Caverns of Echoing Sighs

dynamic_vocabulary.currency: Ash Shards (crystallized remains of burned souls)
